title: CRA office locations - Canada.ca
content:
## CRA office locations

## CRA drop boxes are permanently closed
As of May 29, 2026, the CRA has closed its drop boxes across the country. For more information, visit: CRA drop boxes to permanently close after 2026 tax filing season .
To protect your sensitive information and make sure your income tax and benefit return gets to the CRA quickly and securely, you're strongly encouraged to either:
- file your tax return online using NETFILE .
- mail your paper returns to the appropriate tax centre .
You're also strongly encouraged to make your payment to the CRA electronically using:
- your Canadian financial institution’s (bank or credit union) online banking, mobile app, or telephone banking service
- the CRA’s My Payment service at canada.ca/cra-my-payment
- pre-authorized debit (PAD) at canada.ca/my-cra-account
- your credit card, Interac e-transfer, or PayPal through one of the CRA’s third-party service providers, for a fee
How to pay in person
- at your bank or credit union by cheque or debit. To do so, bring your printed remittance voucher(s).
- at any Canada Post outlet using cash or debit card, for a fee . To do so, you will need a quick response (QR) code.
For more information on all payment options, go to canada.ca/payments .
If you need help filing your income tax and benefit return, our Get ready to do your taxes page has everything you need.

## CRA offices: mailing addresses
Note: There is no walk-in counter service at these locations.
